_meta.description: Verified InRule ICP decision-maker contacts. Every contact here was independently verified this session via at least one of: our own permanent contact database (contacts_master), an official company announcement, a live LinkedIn profile match, or the Explorium (Vibe Prospecting) B2B dataset. Cached here (rather than re-fetched live) because those lookup methods are interactive/manual/rate-limited and not safely re-runnable unattended during a live demo. The SEC signal side of the pipeline (inrule_icp_pipeline.py) IS re-run live every execution.
